scripts.db:migrate:staging: node scripts/wrangler-repo.mjs d1 migrations apply nfc-battle-api-server-staging --remote --env staging
scripts.db:migrate:production: node scripts/wrangler-repo.mjs d1 migrations apply nfc-battle-api-server --remote --env production
scripts.load:k6: node -e "console.log('Choose a scenario: npm run load:k6:lazy-init or npm run load:k6:pair-tags')"
scripts.load:k6:lazy-init: docker run --rm --env-file scripts/k6/.env -v "$PWD:/work" -w /work grafana/k6 run scripts/k6/lazy-initialization.js
scripts.load:k6:pair-tags: docker run --rm --env-file scripts/k6/.env -v "$PWD:/work" -w /work grafana/k6 run scripts/k6/pair-tags.js
